---
title: "spatial_transform"
generated: true
description: "Warp an image by a per-pixel deformation field."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.geometry.grid`](../nitrix-geometry-grid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:spatial_transform -->
```python
spatial_transform(image: Float[Array, '*leading *spatial c'], deformation: Float[Array, '*leading *spatial ndim'], *, mode: BoundaryMode = 'constant', cval: float = 0.0, method: Interpolator = Linear()) -> Float[Array, '*leading *spatial c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:spatial_transform -->
Warp an image by a per-pixel deformation field.

For each output pixel at coordinate `p`, the result is
`image` sampled at `deformation[p]` via the interpolation
`method` ((multi-)linear by default).  `deformation` is
therefore an *absolute* coordinate map, not a relative
displacement.  To use a displacement field `delta`, add
`identity_grid` first:
    warped = spatial_transform(image, identity_grid(spatial) + delta)
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:spatial_transform -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `image` | `Float` | `*leading` Ă— `*spatial` Ă— `c` | â€” | Channel-last image, `(*leading, *spatial, c)`. Leading batch dims are broadcast-compatible with `deformation`. |
| `deformation` | `Float` | `*leading` Ă— `*spatial` Ă— `ndim` | â€” | Absolute sample coordinates, `(*leading, *spatial, ndim)` with `ndim` matching the spatial rank of `image`. The spatial shape need not match `image`'s spatial shape -- for resampling-like ops, `deformation` indexes anywhere in `image`. |
| `mode` | `BoundaryMode` | â€” | `'constant'` | Out-of-bounds handling. Default `"constant"` (preserves the prior contract for image-sampling). Set `mode="nearest"` for edge-replicate (voxelmorph convention for flow-warp); see `integrate_velocity_field` which defaults to `"nearest"` for the same reason. Other valid values: `"wrap"`, `"mirror"`, `"reflect"`. |
| `cval` | `float` | â€” | `0.0` | Constant fill value when `mode="constant"`. Ignored otherwise. Default `0`. |
| `method` | `Interpolator` | â€” | `Linear()` | Interpolation kernel -- an `Interpolator` record. Default `Linear()` ((multi-)linear, the prior behaviour). `NearestNeighbour()` is the label-preserving choice but is not differentiable w.r.t. the deformation (so it cannot drive a registration loss); see `geometry._interpolate` for the full method set and their differentiability contracts. |

**Returns** `Float` â€” shape `*leading` Ă— `*spatial` Ă— `c`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:spatial_transform -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks â€” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **98.5 Âµs** (median, L4); up to **20.66Ă— faster** than `scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_SPATIAL_TRANSFORM.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| spatial_transform | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256] | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| spatial_transform | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256] | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 376.7 Âµs / 447.3 Âµs | 137.27 ms | 493 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00075Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256] | `scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | ok | 1.86 ms / 1.87 ms | 3.54 ms | 453 MB (rss) | âś“ 5.5e-05Ă—tol | 4.93x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256] | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | ok | 52.7 Âµs / 55.4 Âµs | 328.89 ms | 0.79 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00075Ă—tol | 0.56x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256] | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 94.5 Âµs / 98.5 Âµs | 180.28 ms | 1.31 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00098Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256] | `scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | ok | 1.95 ms / 1.97 ms | 1.98 ms | 0.79 MB (hbm) | âś“ 5.5e-05Ă—tol | 20.66x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64] | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| spatial_transform | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64] | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 62.6 Âµs / 69.9 Âµs | 131.48 ms | 493 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00042Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64] | `scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | ok | 120.6 Âµs / 122.3 Âµs | 142.7 Âµs | 453 MB (rss) | âś“ 5.2e-05Ă—tol | 1.93x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64] | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | ok | 53.7 Âµs / 60.3 Âµs | 516.37 ms | 0.05 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00051Ă—tol | 0.56x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64] | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 96.4 Âµs / 99.0 Âµs | 181.00 ms | 0.08 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00043Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spatial_transform | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64] | `scipy.ndimage.map_coordinates` | ok | 126.5 Âµs / 127.9 Âµs | 154.1 Âµs | 0.05 MB (hbm) | âś“ 5.2e-05Ă—tol | 1.31x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `74c2a463` Â· nitrix `fcbe94d3`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:spatial_transform -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*leading` | leading batch axes preceding the spatial grid (variadic) |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
